# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write Envoy proxy configuration for HTTP traffic routing. Define listeners on port 80, clusters for backend services, and routes to match requests. Configure connection pooling and health checks for upstream services. This is for our API gateway proxy.
# Category: envoy_no_tls

apiVersion: envoy.config.network.v3
kind: NetworkFilterConfig
name: api-gateway-filter-chain
filters:
  - name: envoy.filters.http.router
    typed_config:
      "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.http.router.v3beta1.Router
      routers:
        - name: api-gateway-router
          routeConfigurationName: api-gateway-routes

apiVersion: envoy.config.route.v3
kind: RouteConfiguration
name: api-gateway-routes
virtualHosts:
  - name: api-gateway-http
    domains: ["*"]
    routes:
      - match:
          route:
            prefix: "/"
        routeActions:
          - cluster: api-service
            timeout: 500ms

apiVersion: envoy.config.clusters.v3
kind: Cluster
name: api-service
connectTcp:
  config:
    max_connections_per_host_setting: 1000
    draining_timeout_ms: 5s
    idle_timeout: 30s
http2:
  commonHttpProtocolOptions: {}
healthCheck:
  enabled: true
  interval: 5s

apiVersion: envoy.config.listeners.v3
kind: Listener
name: api-gateway-listener
address: {"socketAddress": { "address": "0.0.0.0", "portValue": 80 }}
filterChains:
  - filters:
    - name: envoy.filters.network.tcp_proxy
    - name: api-gateway-filter-chain
